title: Announcement Feed
excerpt: I would love to see an announcement feed on the homepage for our company’s Monday site. This could be where admins/managers/supervisors put in announcements for upcoming office closures, deadlines, reminders, etc. that t…

posts.author: caleb (Caleb)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to see an announcement feed on the homepage for our company’s Monday site. This could be where admins/managers/supervisors put in announcements for upcoming office closures, deadlines, reminders, etc. that the entire team can see when they open the page.

posts.author: KColosiPCCI (Kristen Colosi)
posts.cookedHtml: This exists now under admin permissions > customizations > announcements
